prestazioni: S58B30T0 engine: Full-forged internals with Mahle Motorsport 9.5:1 compression pistons, Pankl Racing Systems titanium connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft with upgraded main and rod bearings from ACL Race Series for sustained 8,500 RPM operation under 1.8 bar of boost via a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger with a 76mm billet compressor wheel and 106mm turbine, paired with a custom 4.5-inch V-band downpipe and a CSF Racing S58-specific front-mount intercooler with dual 2.5-inch charge pipes and silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance

Motec M150 ECU with custom CAN bus integration for real-time telemetry, including individual cylinder fuel trims, knock control via Kistler 6052C piezoelectric sensors, and a 4D ignition map optimized for Sunoco GT260+ race fuel (104 octane) with a port-injected secondary fuel system using Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors for supplemental cooling and power delivery up to 850+ WHP on E85 blends

Ohlins TTX46 MkII 3-way adjustable coilovers with spherical bearing top mounts, 24mm front/22mm rear sway bars from H&R, and a full polybush kit from SuperPro (part numbers SPF1050K, SPF1051K, SPF1052K) for subframe and control arm reinforcement, paired with AP Racing CP9460-1000 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers and 400mm two-piece rotors with titanium hat adapters from Essex Parts
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders (front +2.5 inches, rear +3.0 inches), custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter with integrated dive planes, and a GT3-style rear diffuser from 991 Motorsport, all finished in BMW Individual Frozen Brilliant White (354) with matte black accents on the kidney grilles and side gills

Carbon fiber roof replacement from AC Schnitzer (part #AC-20-10-0001) with a clear bra from XPEL Ultimate Plus, paired with OEM M4 CSL carbon fiber mirrors and a custom titanium exhaust system from Remus (4-2-1 header design with 3.5-inch outlets) featuring dual Akrapovic carbon fiber tips with laser-etched BMW M logos

BBS FI-R 19x10.5 ET25 (front) and 19x12 ET45 (rear) wheels in gold finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30/19 front, 305/30/19 rear) with TPMS sensors from Schrader Electronics, and a custom roll cage from Wiechers-Sport (bolt-in 8-point design with integrated harness bar) upholstered in Alcantara with red contrast stitching from BMW M Performance
